title: Cool Shot Mixed Vodka Shots (25 x 20ml)
features: The 25 pack of COOL SHOT Mixed Vodka Shots are an exciting addition to your party.
Includes a wide selection of shots perfect for any party
WHEN TO ENJOY: This fabulous selection of flavoured vodkas makes the perfect gift for a party goer
HOW TO SERVE: Enjoy chilled over ice, straight as a shot, paired with mixers to create long drinks
WHEN TO ENJOY: The perfect deliciously flavoured spirit ideal for nearly every social gathering to get a party started with friends, uplifting the energy in any room and is simply great fun
description: Product Description Cool Shot Mixed Vodka Shot | Miniature Flavoured Vodka Bottles Cool Shot, the ultimate party catalyst, that ignites the energy in any space, ensuring a blast of pure enjoyment. Whether you’re hosting a house party, celebrating a wedding, or seeking the perfect gift, Cool Shot is the answer. Ready to elevate your party experience? Cool Shot offers diverse flavours in captivating colours of flavoured vodka shots in 20ml miniature bottles with an ABV of 15%. 5x Strawberry Vodka Shots, 5x Tropical Fruit Vodka Shots, 5 x Blue Vodka Shots, 5x Berry Burst Vodka Shots, 5x Apple Vodka Shots.
